summary: Implemented slash-command discovery in the chat UI so typing `/` now opens a commands panel showing all available built-in chat commands with descriptions. Added keyboard navigation (up/down), Tab autocomplete, and smart submit resolution so partial slash input selects the highlighted command when Enter is pressed. This directly addresses the request for command visibility when entering slash mode.
current_status: Chat TUI now includes OpenClaude-like shell + boxed chat area and interactive slash command list behavior; build passes cleanly with no lints in the edited file.
